issue_summary: Move cardinality method, rename frequency to countMatches.
javadoc_before: /** * Returns the number of occurrences of obj in coll. * * @param obj the object to find the cardinality of * @param coll the {@link Iterable} to search * @param the type of object that the {@link Iterable} may contain. * @return the the number of occurrences of obj in coll */
javadoc_after: /** * Returns the number of occurrences of obj in coll. * * @param obj the object to find the cardinality of * @param coll the {@link Iterable} to search * @param the type of object that the {@link Iterable} may contain. * @return the the number of occurrences of obj in coll * @throws NullPointerException if coll is null * @deprecated since 4.1, use {@link IterableUtils#cardinality(Iterable, Object)} instead. * Be aware that the order of parameters has changed. */
